release_note:
- v2.27.2 refactors and optimizes the file service and WebDav frontend display.
- CorazaWAF built-in rules were updated to v4.22.0, with rule tips and custom inbound/outbound threshold settings.
- The gdy666/lucky:2.27.2 Docker image tag was published on 2026-02-02.
tagline: 家用软硬路由公网利器
description: 一款功能强大的端口转发、反向代理、动态域名、网络唤醒、IPv4内网穿透、webdav服务、计划任务和自动证书管理工具。

tips.before_install: 默认登录账号 `666`，默认登录密码 `666`,提示：`每次更新前，请记得备份好配置`
